title: Keyboard Cultivation
description:
In an age of declining sects and corrupted scriptures, only a handful of cultivators still willing to walk the Keyboard Dao. 

This mod replaces Glyphica standard word list with words and references from Xianxia and cultivation novels. Expect familiar concepts such as sects, dao, tribulations, dantians, and other vocabulary commonly found in the cultivation genre. 

If you wish to temper your typing skills like a true cultivator, abandon these mortal words and step onto the Keyboard Dao!
